productName: Stars & Rosin - Rainbow Belts x Banana Cream Rosin - .5g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Rainbow Belts supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of tropical, tree fruit, and apricot, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
